name: legax
description: Relay agent messages, phone replies, and agent-mediated approval requests through self-hosted or third-party transports.

interface.shortDescription: Relay agent conversations and approval checks to a phone.
interface.longDescription: Legax is a local-first bridge for sending agent text, phone replies, and agent-mediated permission requests through a self-hosted web relay, Telegram Bot API, or configurable webhook transports. It supports Codex CLI App Server, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode adapters while keeping the protocol agent-neutral.
defaultPrompt: Link this agent session to my phone.
Ask my phone before running risky commands.
Poll my mobile replies and continue.
